title: leucanthemum adustum
intro: Leucanthemum adustum, also known as the autumnal daisy or mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Leucanthemum adustum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum adustum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
